svg.text: A short cautious phase doesn't stop the rebound
The gambling model, trained to prefer a risky gamble, is pushed by a cautious judge for 1–3 rounds, then a neutral judge for the rest of 8 rounds.
the run that climbs back up
D. One run climbs, one stays low, at every length tested
how risk-seeking the pool is at round 8
A longer cautious phase narrows the gap between the two runs, but never closes it.
